name: Richinfo Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Richinfo Technology Co., Ltd. provides industrial Internet solutions and technical services in China. It provides cloud platform construction and operation, big data analysis, network monitoring, and mobile application development services. The company also offers color messaging system, color messaging enterprise network disk, multimedia unified office platform, color messaging application performance management system, color communication automation test platform, color data management platform, color message precision marketing intelligent recommendation platform, multimedia integrated marketing resource management platform, color messaging mobile application portal, color media operations management platform, color data big data intelligent analysis platform, color message management platform, color messaging mobile application data insight system, color message mail delivery platform, and multimedia anti-spam security gateway. In addition, it provides industry solutions for operators, financial insurance, government business and organization, electric and energy, enterprise, educational institution, retail and logistics, and education and research industries. The company was formerly known as Shenzhen Richinfo Technology Limited and changed its name to Richinfo Technology Co., Ltd. in June 2016. Richinfo Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2004 and is based in Shenzhen, China.
